_comment: Chained-OOM stress dictionary. Five large (~23 KB text / ~30 page), style-dense HTML definitions whose text cyclically embeds the next headword as a selectable token (chain_stress_00001 -> 00002 -> ... -> 00005 -> 00001). Purpose: drive deep deterministic lookup chains on device while watching heap stay flat (Stage 2a/2b RAM fix) and exercise the lookup-chain depth cap. Used only by ch22 of test_dictionary.epub.
